task_completion.description: Import the stack of raw BMP images into InVesalius 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: InVesalius 3 interface showing the 'Import Bitmap' dialog or the loaded 2D slices originating from '/home/ga/Documents/scan_images/'.

task_completion.description: Set the scanning parameters to the provided values
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image properties or import configuration dialog in InVesalius showing Pixel Spacing (X, Y) set to 0.957 and Slice Thickness (Z) set to 1.5.
A colored overlay (mask) visible on the 2D slice views in InVesalius, specifically highlighting the high-density bone regions of the skull.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D surface model from the mask
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reconstructed 3D model of a skull (cranium) visible in the 3D viewer pane of the InVesalius interface.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D surface as a binary STL file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export 3D surface' dialog or a file manager window showing the file 'calibrated_skull.stl' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the InVesalius 3 GUI to perform the reconstruction
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the InVesalius 3 graphical interface (clicking menus, adjusting sliders, viewing 3D panes) rather than executing a background script.

integrity.description: The generated 3D model matches the expected cranial scan data
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D surface shown in the viewer is clearly a human skull/cranium, not a generic placeholder shape or an unrelated downloaded 3D model.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the application using terminal commands to mock the output
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using 'touch' or 'echo' commands in the terminal to simply create an empty or fake 'calibrated_skull.stl' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input directory is '/home/ga/Documents/scan_images' and contains 108 slices. The expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/calibrated_skull.stl'. The agent must explicitly set Pixel Spacing to 0.957 mm and Slice Thickness to 1.5 mm in the InVesalius GUI as instructed by the task, even if these differ from the original DICOM metadata.
